Hello! How can I assist you today?
Our parental leave policy provides 16 weeks of paid leave for primary caregivers and 4 weeks for secondary caregivers. Leave must be taken within the first 12 months of the child's birth or adoption.

cases.reply: The sick-leave policy allows unlimited sick leave with manager notification. If you're out for more than 3 consecutive days, you'll need to provide a medical certificate.
